word: H65 - אָבֵל מְחֹולָה - ʼÂbêl Mᵉchôwlâh - aw-bale' mekh-o-law' - Abel-meholah

sections.paragraph:
Original: אבל מחולה

Transliteration: 'âbêl mechôlâh

Phonetic: aw-bale' mekh-o-law'

BDB Definition:

Abel Meholah = "meadow of dancing"
  1. a city of Issachar, birthplace of Elisha

Origin: from H58 and H4246

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
Cognate: H58, H59, H62, H63, H64, H66, H67
